questions.question: What state's disasters caused a governor's aide to sigh, "We call them plagues. We're just two behind Egypt-frogs and boils"?
What veteran crooner won the 1994 Album of the Year Grammy for MTV Unplugged?
What country did Bill Clinton visit with a record retinue of over 1,000?
Who coined the phrase "natural selection" to describe the evolutionary process?
What North American country's bar patrons were the first to thrill to the sport of gerbil racing?
What four words did George Costanza scream when he thought he'd impregnated a woman?
